note: Seed tributes inserted (as 'approved') on first DB init so the site isn't empty. Real visitor submissions arrive via the API as 'pending' and require moderation.

tributes.author: Sarah M.
tributes.quote: Vincent played "Amazing Grace" for my mother the week she passed. I will never forget the peace it brought the whole room.

tributes.author: David R.
tributes.quote: He never missed a Tuesday. Twenty-one years of Tuesdays. That was Vincent.

tributes.author: The Chen Family
tributes.quote: Our father didn't speak in his last days, but he hummed along when Vincent played. We are forever grateful.

tributes.author: Margaret L.
tributes.quote: A gentle man with a gift he gave away freely. The hospice was warmer for having him in it.

tributes.author: James P.
tributes.quote: I asked him once why he did it. He said no one should be alone with silence. I think of that often.

tributes.author: Elena V.
tributes.quote: He taught me that music is a kind of company. I carry his songs with me still.
